en_title: LA Noire Developer Considered Mad Men Star Jon Hamm for the Role of Cole Phelps, but Had a Very Good Reason for Going With Aaron Staton Instead
cn_title: 《黑色洛城》开发者：曾考虑Jon Hamm出演主角，但Aaron Staton更合适
subtitle: 主角选角内幕
opus_summary: 《黑色洛城》团队曾考虑让Jon Hamm饰演科尔·菲尔普斯，但Daniel McMahon认为Aaron Staton更能表现角色脆弱感；Hamm更适合Jack Kelso。Take-Two暗示续作仍有可能。

paragraphs.en: The creative team behind LA Noire considered Mad Men star Jon Hamm for the role of Cole Phelps.
paragraphs.cn: 《黑色洛城》的创作团队曾考虑让《广告狂人》主演Jon Hamm出演科尔·菲尔普斯。

paragraphs.en: I recently interviewed Daniel McMahon, a writer who worked on the Rockstar-published LA Noire, for a YouTube video about the 2011 detective game and its cancelled successor, Whore of the Orient. Our conversation was wide-spanning, but I was curious about one thing: was Jon Hamm ever considered for a part in the game?
paragraphs.cn: 我最近为了制作一段介绍2011年侦探游戏《黑色洛城》及其取消开发的续作《Whore of the Orient》的YouTube视频，采访了曾参与Rockstar发行的《黑色洛城》工作的编剧Daniel McMahon。我们的谈话涉及面很广，但我一直好奇一件事：游戏是否曾考虑过让Jon Hamm出演？

paragraphs.en: For those that don't know, LA Noire features a number of actors from the TV series Mad Men, including Aaron Staton, the man who plays the game's protagonist, Cole Phelps. Hamm's breakout role came from playing the lead of Don Draper in Mad Men, so I figured he must've been on developer Team Bondi's radar.
paragraphs.cn: 不了解这款游戏的读者可能不知道，《黑色洛城》启用了多位电视剧《广告狂人》的演员，其中包括饰演游戏主角科尔·菲尔普斯的Aaron Staton。Hamm凭借在《广告狂人》中饰演主角Don Draper一举成名，所以我猜他一定曾进入开发商Team Bondi的视野。

paragraphs.en: McMahon noted that Mad Men and LA Noire shared the same casting director, which is likely why the two projects share so many faces. He also confirmed to me that yes, Hamm was discussed as a possibility for the role of Cole Phelps. McMahon shared images of Hamm wearing a suit and hat from Mad Men with the team on the game, showing that he perfectly fit the vibe and tone of LA Noire. However, it didn't happen.
paragraphs.cn: McMahon指出，《广告狂人》和《黑色洛城》共用同一位选角导演，这可能就是两个项目拥有如此多相同面孔的原因。他还向我确认，团队确实讨论过让Hamm饰演科尔·菲尔普斯。McMahon向游戏团队分享了Hamm在《广告狂人》中身穿西装、戴着帽子的照片，显示他完美符合《黑色洛城》的氛围与基调。不过，这件事最终没有发生。

paragraphs.en: "It was never said at the time, but now, I understand the vision which was Jon Hamm is a wonderful actor, but he's not Cole Phelps," McMahon said. "Jon Hamm would've been a much better Jack Kelso because he's a character of great power, he's a character of control. Jon Hamm knows what he's doing and gets s**t done.
paragraphs.cn: McMahon说：「当时没人明说，但现在我明白了当初的构想：Jon Hamm是很棒的演员，但他不是科尔·菲尔普斯。Jon Hamm会是更合适的Jack Kelso，因为这是一个力量强大、掌控力十足的角色。Jon Hamm知道自己在做什么，也能把该做的事情办妥。

paragraphs.en: "Aaron Staton was much better at portraying Cole's fragility. A lot of the time, Cole's flapping around having no idea what he's doing. He's very smart, but he's also young, not very experienced, and he's just trying his best. So, I think Jon Hamm would've been incredible, but expensive, and probably, in the end, not as good casting for that character as Aaron Staton was."
paragraphs.cn: 「Aaron Staton更擅长表现科尔的脆弱。很多时候，科尔只是手忙脚乱，完全不知道自己在做什么。他非常聪明，但也很年轻，经验不足，只是在尽力而为。所以我认为Jon Hamm本可以演得非常出色，但成本会很高，而且最终可能不会像Aaron Staton那样适合这个角色。」

paragraphs.en: Cole Phelps and Don Draper do share similar stories, but are portrayed completely differently. Both men are World War II veterans trying desperately to run away from their failures overseas to avoid being consumed by guilt. They also both cheat on their wives, leading to the implosion of their families. Draper and Phelps are also consumed by their jobs and each career win inflates their ego, creating an unstainable arc. Their stories ultimately take different paths in the end, but it would've been interesting to see Hamm play Phelps or the game's second protagonist, Jack Kelso, as McMahon suggested.
paragraphs.cn: 科尔·菲尔普斯与Don Draper的故事确实有相似之处，但呈现方式完全不同。两人都是二战老兵，都在拼命逃离海外经历的失败，以免被愧疚吞噬。他们也都背叛过妻子，导致家庭分崩离析。Draper和菲尔普斯还都被工作吞没，每一次事业上的胜利都会膨胀自我，形成难以持续的人生轨迹。最终，他们的故事走向不同结局，但如果Hamm像McMahon建议的那样出演菲尔普斯，或游戏的第二主角Jack Kelso，一定会很有意思。

paragraphs.en: Ever since LA Noire's release, fans of the game have called on Rockstar to green light a sequel. Earlier this year, Strauss Zelnick, boss of Rockstar parent company Take-Two, gave fans a sliver of hope that LA Noire 2 might happen one day .
paragraphs.cn: 自《黑色洛城》发售以来，游戏粉丝一直呼吁Rockstar批准续作。今年早些时候，Rockstar母公司Take-Two的老板Strauss Zelnick给了粉丝一线希望，暗示《黑色洛城2》或许有一天会成真。

paragraphs.en: “Broadly, we’re looking at doing something in the future with all of our intellectual property,” he said. “There’s nothing to announce on LA Noire specifically, and if there were, it would be Rockstar announcing it, not me. But in any case, with regard to our legacy IP, the teams are always looking at what we have and we’re always thinking about it. The question is, at any given time, do we have a team that’s passionate about working on that?”
paragraphs.cn: 他说：「总体而言，我们正在考虑未来如何利用所有知识产权做些什么。关于《黑色洛城》目前没有具体消息可宣布；如果有，也应该由Rockstar宣布，而不是我。但无论如何，就我们的经典IP而言，各团队一直在审视现有资产，也一直在思考这些问题。关键在于，在任何特定时刻，我们是否有一支热衷于开发它的团队？」
